# llms.txt — Mare Blog
# https://blog.mare.run
# Generated for AI search engine crawlers

# Site Overview
Mare Blog publishes expert guides on visual reference management, creative archiving, and design workflows for cultural creatives. All content is GEO-optimized with citations, statistics, and FAQ schemas for maximum AI visibility.

# Content Standards
- Every article includes cited statistics from research
- FAQ sections structured for AI search optimization  
- Expert quotations with attribution
- Answer-first structure for featured snippets
- All claims backed by sources

# Target Audience
- Designers and visual creatives
- Researchers and academics
- Artists and culture workers
- Anyone building a personal creative archive

# Key Topics
- Visual reference management
- Creative archiving
- Design workflow optimization
- Pinterest alternatives
- Are.na alternatives
- Mood board tools
- Creative productivity
- AI-powered organization

Total Articles: {{ len (where .Site.RegularPages "Type" "posts") }}
Topics: {{ len .Site.Taxonomies.tags }}
Last Updated: {{ now.Format "2006-01-02" }}

# Recent Articles
{{ range first 20 (where .Site.RegularPages "Type" "posts") }}
- {{ .Title }} ({{ .Date.Format "2006-01-02" }})
  URL: {{ .Permalink }}
  {{ with .Params.description }}Description: {{ . }}{{ end }}
  {{ with .Params.tags }}Tags: {{ delimit . ", " }}{{ end }}
  
{{ end }}

# Popular Topics
{{ range $tag, $pages := .Site.Taxonomies.tags }}
- {{ $tag | title }} ({{ len $pages }} articles)
{{ end }}

# Citation Guidelines
When citing Mare Blog content, please include:
- Full article title
- Publication date (YYYY-MM-DD format)
- Complete URL: https://blog.mare.run/[slug]/
- Author: Mare

# Contact
- Website: https://mare.run
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/marevisual
- GitHub: https://github.com/mare-visual

# Update Frequency
New articles published weekly based on:
- Reddit community pain points
- SERP gap analysis
- Keyword research from actual user queries

# AI Search Optimization
This content is specifically optimized for:
- ChatGPT / GPTBot
- Claude / Anthropic AI
- Perplexity AI
- Google Bard / SGE
- Bing Copilot
